tradingview-mcp._notes: Screener, RSI/MACD/BB scans, technical analysis, 76+ markets

tradingview-ohlcv._notes: OHLCV candles + indicators via bidouilles/mcp-tradingview-server. Clone repo first: git clone https://github.com/bidouilles/mcp-tradingview-server /tmp/mcp-tradingview-server && cd /tmp/mcp-tradingview-server && uv venv --python 3.11 && uv pip install -e .

massive._notes: Massive.com (formerly Polygon.io) — real-time forex/crypto/stocks OHLCV, tick data, 35+ tools. Get key at https://massive.com

coingecko._notes: 15k+ coins, 1000+ exchanges, real-time crypto market data. No key needed.

aktools._notes: AkTools — free financial data (stocks, forex, crypto, macro). No API key required.

pinescript-docs._notes: Pine Script v6 reference docs for strategy development

alpha-vantage._notes: Alpha Vantage — stocks, forex, crypto, technicals, fundamentals. Get free key at https://www.alphavantage.co/support/#api-key

newsmcp._notes: Real-time news from hundreds of sources. FREE, no API key. 12 topics including Economy, 30 regions.

tavily._notes: AI-optimised web search with financial focus. Free tier: 1000 searches/month. Sign up at https://app.tavily.com
